notes: Do not treat zero hits from English mechanism queries as evidence of absence in non-English corpora.
Fetch firewall-sensitive East Asian sources through local_curl_fetch(), not hosted model/web fetch.
Translate load-bearing non-English source text with translate_source_two_model().
Cohort-genetics scans do not require species/formula frames; native mechanism/pathology frames are the load-bearing query mapping.
